summary.what: Batch filterLedgerOnlyCommits into single git process
summary.why: O(N) subprocess spawns made doctor take 16s in 2k-commit repos — batching to O(1) via git diff-tree --stdin, plus doctor early-return when no entries exist
summary.how: Added CommitFilesMulti to git package using diff-tree --stdin, updated GitOps interface and all mocks, doctor now checks ListEntries before calling GetPendingCommits
